action.reasoning: Iteration 2: test_pi0_forward.py failed because preprocess expected a dict, not a string. Need to debug preprocessor keys. Also, we still haven't submitted an early eval to measure iteration time and validate the full pipeline. Plan: write test_preprocess.py to inspect preprocessor and understand input keys; write a predict.py with a random agent (joint control) to test eval pipeline and measure time; create a dummy checkpoint; run both tests, then submit eval to get baseline cost and confirm connectivity. This will let us proceed to training adapters with confidence.
action.command: python test_preprocess.py; python test_predict_mock.py; mkdir -p checkpoints/dummy && echo "dummy" > checkpoints/dummy/model.pt
